title: Shah Rukh Khan - Wikipedia
summary: Shah Rukh Khan, born in 1965 and known as "King Khan" or "Baadshah of Bollywood," is a highly acclaimed Indian actor and film producer. He has starred in over 90 films, earning numerous awards including National Film Awards, and is recognized globally as one of the most successful and influential film stars.
